conversation.text_en: Hi, I'm your therapist. Everything we discuss here is confidential, so please feel comfortable.
Thanks, I appreciate that.
So, you drove in without any issues. Can you tell me a bit about what brought you to therapy at this time?
Honestly, I just can't seem to focus on anything anymore. It's like my brain is always foggy and I'm falling behind at work.
I see. It sounds like you're feeling pretty frustrated with your job right now. Can you tell me more about what's going on at the warehouse?
Well, we're short-staffed and it's all piling up on me. I'm trying to keep up but it feels like nothing gets done anymore.
That sounds really overwhelming. How have your relationships with friends and family been lately?
They're still okay, I guess. But I just don't have the energy to do anything social or fun. I'm just exhausted all the time.
It's like you're running on empty most of the time. Have you noticed any changes in your appetite recently?
Yeah, it's been really hard for me to eat lately. Even thinking about food makes me feel anxious.
Okay, so you're not having much interest in food or activities that used to bring you joy. That can be really tough. How have you been sleeping?
To be honest, I'm not sleeping at all. I just lay there staring at the ceiling all night.
It sounds like you're feeling pretty burned out. Can you think of anything in your daily routine that might be contributing to these problems?
Honestly, I don't know what's going on with me anymore. I feel like I'm losing myself or something.
That can be a really scary feeling. It sounds like you're struggling to find meaning and purpose right now. What do you think is causing this sense of emptiness?
I guess it's just the feeling that nothing matters anymore, you know? Like, what's the point of any of it?
That can be a really isolating experience. It sounds like you're feeling disconnected from your usual interests and activities. Have you tried anything to reconnect with yourself recently?
I mean, I used to play guitar but now I just don't have the patience or energy for that stuff.
Okay, so music is something you used to enjoy but haven't been able to make time for lately. That can be a real challenge.
Yeah, it's like everything takes so much more effort than it used to. Even simple things like getting out of bed in the morning are hard.
It sounds like you're feeling pretty exhausted physically and mentally. Have you noticed any changes in your mood lately?
Yeah, I get really irritable all the time now. Little things set me off and I just feel like snapping at people.
Okay, so it's not just physical symptoms you're experiencing, but also emotional ones. Can you tell me more about what happens when you start to feel this way?
Honestly, I just get overwhelmed and want to hide or escape somehow. It feels like my emotions are just too much for me to handle.
That can be really tough to deal with. It sounds like you're feeling pretty stuck right now. What do you think would help you feel less stuck?
Honestly, I don't know. Maybe if I could just get some energy back and start enjoying things again.
Okay, so it sounds like you're looking for a sense of purpose and joy in your life. Can you tell me about any recent stressful events that might be contributing to these feelings?
Well, we had a big shipment come in last week and I had to deal with the fallout. It was just one thing after another.
Okay, so it sounds like work has been really stressful lately. Have you thought about how you might take care of yourself during this time?
Honestly, no. I've just been trying to keep up and hoping things get better soon.
Okay, well we can definitely work on that together. What are some things that you usually do to relax or unwind?
Um, nothing really. I used to play video games but even that feels too much energy right now.
Okay, so it sounds like you're not doing anything to take care of yourself lately. Have you considered reaching out to friends or family for support?
Yeah, they've been trying to help me but I just don't want to burden them with my problems.
Okay, so you feel like you're putting a lot of pressure on others to solve your problems. Can you tell me more about what's going through your mind when you think about seeking support?
Honestly, it feels like nobody would really understand or care anyway.
Okay, so you're feeling pretty isolated and alone right now. What do you hope to get out of our time together today?
I guess just some help figuring out what's going on with me and how to make it stop.
Okay, well we can definitely work on that. Before we wrap up for today, is there anything in particular that you're hoping to achieve by the end of our sessions together?
Honestly, I'm not sure. Maybe just being able to enjoy my life again without feeling like I'm stuck.
Okay, so it sounds like your goal is to get back to a place where you feel fulfilled and happy. Is there anything else that's been on your mind lately?
Yeah, just the feeling that time is passing me by and I'm not doing anything about it.

Okay, well we can definitely explore that further in future sessions. For now, let's focus on getting you back to a place where you feel more energized and motivated. We'll work on building some coping strategies together and exploring ways for you to get your life back on track.
